name: intelliverse-x-nakama-modules
description: IntelliVerse-X Nakama server runtime with custom Hiro + Satori systems

scripts.build: npx tsc && node scripts/seed-video-quiz-catalog.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');fs.readdirSync('.').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.lua')).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(f,p.join('build',f)));" && node postbuild.js && echo Build complete
